acquisition method: The system was run in data-dependent mode selecting the 10 most abundant ions for fractionation
cleavage agent: first by lysyl endopeptidase (LysC, Wako chemicals) before being trypsinated (Trypsin, Promega)
fractionation method: peptides were put back on StageTips and desalted with Buffer A (5% acetonitrile and 0.1% formic acid).
instrument: analyzed using a Q-Exactive mass spectrometer
ionization type: An electrospray ion source (ThermoScientific) was used to ionize the peptides
labeling: stable isotope labelling by amino acids in cell culture (SILAC) DMEM
